name: Beef & Tequila Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Meat (boneless chuck, tip, or round), cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef in a skillet with oil until cooked through.
2. Remove the beef and set aside.
3. Cook the onion and bacon in the same skillet until the bacon is crisp.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (tequila, flour, tomato juice, oil, tomatoes, salt, garbanzo beans, and garlic) to the skillet.
5. Heat to boiling, then reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer until the beef is tender, about 1 hour.
